---
title: "Resources"
---

# oharac.github.io

website

## blogs and general resources:

* www.burns-stat.com/documents/tutorials/impatient-r/
* https://statsthewayilikeit.com/about/statistical-test-flowchart/

## tutorials to explore:

### cool plots

* https://www.r-bloggers.com/subplots-in-maps-with-ggplot2/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/data-visualization-with-googlevis-exercises-part-1/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/a-very-palette-able-post/
* http://www.color-blindness.com/coblis-color-blindness-simulator/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/a-plot-against-the-catterplots-complot/
* https://github.com/Gibbsdavidl/CatterPlots
* https://blog.ouseful.info/2017/03/17/experimenting-with-sankey-diagrams-in-r-and-python/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/sankey-charts-for-swinging-voters/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/forest-plot-with-horizontal-bands
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/ggplot2-easy-way-to-mix-multiple-graphs-on-the-same-page/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/how-to-build-a-color-palette-from-any-image-with-r-and-k-means-algo/
* https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/ggjoy/vignettes/introduction.html
* http://blog.revolutionanalytics.com/2017/07/joyplots.html

### cool maps

* http://spatial.ly/2017/04/population-lines-how-and-why-i-created-it/
* http://colinfay.me/rstats-create-a-pixel-map-with-r/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/plot-the-vote-making-u-s-senate-house-cartograms-in-r
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/animated-world-inequality-map/

### cool analyses

* https://jennybc.github.io/purrr-tutorial/index.html
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/machine-learning-linear-regression-full-example-boston-housing
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/simulation-of-empirical-bayesian-methods-using-baseball-statistics/
* http://varianceexplained.org/r/empirical_bayes_baseball/
* https://github.com/prioritizr/teaching/tree/master/cbcs-seminar
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/network-analysis-of-game-of-thrones-family-ties/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/random-forest-classification-of-mushrooms/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/predicting-wine-quality-using-random-forests/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/neural-networks-exercises-part-3/

### shiny

* https://www.r-bloggers.com/find-modern-interactive-web-based-charts-for-r-at-the-htmlwidgets-gallery/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/shiny-application-layouts-exercises-part-1
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/shiny-application-layouts-exercises-part-2
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/shiny-application-layouts-exercises-part-3
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/shiny-application-layouts-exercises-part-4
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/shiny-application-layouts-exercises-part-5
* https://stoltzmaniac.shinyapps.io/medicare_data/ - how to include a csv download button in shiny

### heatmaps

* https://plot.ly/r/heatmaps/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/search/heatmap/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/how-to-make-a-simple-heatmap-in-ggplot2/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/it-seems-dplyr-is-overtaking-correlation-heatmaps/
* https://martinsbioblogg.wordpress.com/2013/03/21/using-r-correlation-heatmap-with-ggplot2/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/shinyheatmaply-a-shiny-app-for-creating-interactive-cluster-heatmaps/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/superheat-supercharged-heatmaps-for-r/

### text analysis

* https://www.r-bloggers.com/release-open-data-from-their-pdf-prisons-using-tabulizer
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/retrieving-reading-levels-with-r
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/character-functions-advanced/
* http://blog.revolutionanalytics.com/2017/04/warren-buffet-sentiment.html
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/parsing-text-for-emotion-terms-analysis-visualization-using-r/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/twitter-sentiment-analysis-with-machine-learning-in-r-using-doc2vec-approach/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/whats-in-the-words-comparing-artists-and-lyrics-with-r/
* https://www.r-bloggers.com/sentiment-analysis-of-the-lord-of-the-rings-with-tidytext/
* https://ropensci.org/packages/#literature

### misc

* https://www.r-bloggers.com/teach-kids-about-r-with-minecraft/
